summary: NASA Open APIs are exposed through the api.nasa.gov gateway, with representative endpoints for APOD, Mars Rover Photos, and EPIC imagery metadata.

auth.instructions: Use the api.nasa.gov API key model: include api_key in query parameters as either DEMO_KEY (limited demo usage) or a personal key generated from the NASA API portal for production workloads. Endpoint-specific query parameters remain required (for example sol, date, or thumbs).

external_docs.description: Official API catalog source used by api.nasa.gov

endpoints.name: get-apod
endpoints.description: Astronomy Picture of the Day metadata and media URL; supports single-day or date-range retrieval.

endpoints.name: list-mars-rover-photos
endpoints.description: Lists Mars Rover photos for a rover by Martian sol or Earth date, with optional camera filter.

endpoints.name: get-mars-rover-manifest
endpoints.description: Returns mission manifest details (launch/landing date, max sol/date, and photo counts) for a rover.

endpoints.name: list-epic-natural-images
endpoints.description: Returns available EPIC natural-color image metadata for recent observations.

endpoints.name: list-epic-natural-images-by-date
endpoints.description: Returns EPIC natural-color image metadata for a specific UTC date.
